name: Sir Lucretius — SEARCH
description:
Hornhollow, a secluded trove of outlaws, smugglers, and runaways of all shape and form. Hidden within the desolate Red Dunes, just beyond the lethal Red Dune worm territories.

A dangerous labyrinth hidden within a series of ravines, lively with not-so-friendly hostels and many a black markets — all gathered around the Banshee Falls. An oasis of nearly one hundred waterfalls that supplies run for miles under the blistering desert in ancient aqueducts.

It’s also where Sir Lucretius — Better known as Luc, is currently stranded. At least until he can find Proculus. His bonded dragon, which had been abducted after they had touched down by the Clawed Slopes during a sandstorm.

Now sporting a parched throat, and a very unhappy attitude— Luc very much wants to return home to his Kingdom of Elddare before he or his dragon get roasted on one of the many meat skewers the street merchants keep trying to sell him.

This is a very open ended prompt! Made for my own greedy selfishness(Lwk forgot about this but hey it is here) A lot of it is inspired by the world of Avatar, The last airbender, arcane, and general fantasy tropes etc.

Who/What you want to be is up to you! It’s ANYPOV, and any race, such as Elf, Dwarf, or even Dragonborn is open to you. This is sort of like a dnd-*ish* opening/inspired adventure, so options are limited only by your creativity <3

You get to choose what role you’ll play and whether you’ll help this lost soul, or make sure he’s trapped forever in the seemingly never ending streets.

(I’m trying to work on my world building and writing in general because it’s one of my passions, so this one will include a lot more stuff. I’ll leave description open in case anyone wants to read the world building because that is one of my favourite things to do on this site!)

(How I imagine the Hornhollow markets might look)

Peace :p
creator: Ren_Loves_Books!
